title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 -  30 -  2017: Google Earthing Region 14 Ancient Rome

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night update on his Google Earth 3D reconstruction project of ancient Rome's Region 14 (Trastevere), detailing his progress modeling apartments, houses, and pillars. He shares statistics about the number of residential units from historical catalogs, estimates finishing the full region by end of April, and briefly mentions seeing Star Wars and a Churchill film over the holidays.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: preserving ancient Roman roads in his model
stances.position: keeping the original road layout is the best way to remember how ancient Rome looked, even though it happened by accident
won't hit a region per week but estimates completing Region 14 by end of April
liked it; found the disruptive audience member memorable but not sympathetic
should look into it to save time but keeps procrastinating
